hyperedges.label: Artist Page Component Composition
Core Database Tables (Supabase Schema)
Accessibility: Reduced Motion Pattern
Lineup Display Mode Components
Headliner Detection Pattern (duplicated across components)
Festival Theme Derivation Pipeline
Festival Data Pipeline: Scraper → Enrichers → DB Tables
Lineup Write Orchestration: Scraper + Seeder + Manager → lineups table
Frontend Data Access Layer: supabase client + queries + types
ETL Pipeline: Data Sources → Python Scripts → Supabase Storage
Frontend Data Consumption: Supabase API → Next.js Pages → UI Components
AI Fun Facts Pipeline: Claude API → fun_facts_generator → FunFactsWidget

nodes.label: Row Level Security: Public Read Policies
nodes.rationale: Frontend uses anon key with public reads only; all writes go through the service role key in the pipeline. RLS enforces this boundary at the database level.
nodes.norm_label: row level security: public read policies

nodes.label: dates_estimated Column (festivals)
nodes.rationale: Boolean flag indicating algorithmically estimated dates vs official announcements; UI shows '~August 2026' for estimated dates to avoid presenting potentially wrong precise dates.

nodes.label: vector_art Column (festivals)
nodes.rationale: Raw SVG generated by Claude AI, stored per festival. Used as a fallback hero visual when no Unsplash photo is available.

nodes.label: RLS Public Read / Service Write Pattern
nodes.rationale: All tables use Row Level Security with public SELECT policies for the anon key and no public INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, so only the pipeline's service role key can write data. This isolates the frontend to read-only access.
nodes.norm_label: rls public read / service write pattern

nodes.label: Idempotent Seed / Upsert Pattern
nodes.rationale: All seed scripts use ON CONFLICT ... DO NOTHING or DO UPDATE so they can be safely re-run without duplicating data.

nodes.label: Row Level Security (public read, service write)
nodes.norm_label: row level security (public read, service write)

nodes.norm_label: tenacity retry pattern for external apis
